meaning: n.瀵岃吹鑽夊睘闀块潚鍦拌妞嶇墿
examples: Groundcover such as ivy, vinca, pachysandra, gazania, etc.
Drag onto the page to add ground cover, such as ivy, vinca, pachysandra, or gazania.
Many perennial ground cover plants, such as ivy, periwinkle, pachysandra, mondo grass and liriope, will cover the soil and act as a mulch.
